Blurb Back to home

Privacy Policy

Clear and minimal, just like the app.

Blurb is built to help you share links quickly in person. This page explains what data the app stores, what it does not collect, and how that information is used.

Effective date March 31, 2026

On this page

Information collected How it is used Data storage Third-party links Data sharing Security Policy changes Contact

Information collected

Blurb is designed to keep data collection minimal. The app only stores the information required to create and display the links you choose to share.

Information you provide

  • Website URLs
  • Social media links
  • Optional titles or labels for cards

This information is used only to generate and display QR codes for sharing.

Information Blurb does not collect

  • Phone numbers
  • Email addresses
  • Contact lists
  • Device contacts

Blurb does not track or log who scans your QR codes.

How it is used

Information saved in Blurb is used only to:

  • Store links you add as cards
  • Generate QR codes from those links
  • Display your saved cards in the app

Blurb does not use this information for advertising, analytics profiling, or marketing.

Data storage

Depending on the app implementation, card data may be stored locally on your device. If cloud sync or account features are added in the future, this policy will be updated before those changes take effect.

Third-party links

Blurb cards can point to external websites and social platforms. When someone scans your QR code, they are taken directly to that external service.

Blurb is not responsible for the privacy practices of third-party websites or platforms.

Data sharing

Blurb does not sell, rent, or share user data with third parties.

The only information shared is the link encoded inside the QR code when you choose to display it.

Security

Reasonable steps are taken to protect stored data, but no digital system can guarantee absolute security.

Only add links you are comfortable sharing publicly, and make sure those links point to safe destinations.

Policy changes

This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. When that happens, the effective date at the top of the page will be updated as well.

Contact

If you have questions about this policy, contact:

hey@prnsh.site
